S.FORM: = Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 6 jiyax 29 ka Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Turkmenistan ta sayang o kiya ka Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 12 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = guɾbaŋulj bəɾdimuħamədow = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka guɾbaŋulj bəɾdimuħamədow ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tuɾkmənistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka guɾbaŋulj bəɾdimuħamədow, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak pnjaħan pnatas
S.FORM: = Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 6 jiyax 29 ka Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Turkmenistan ta sayang o kiya ka Gurbanguly Berdimuhamedow, pnaah hngkawas 2006 idas 12 jiyax 21 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: = guɾbaŋulj bəɾdimuħamədow = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka guɾbaŋulj bəɾdimuħamədow ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan tuɾkmənistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka guɾbaŋulj bəɾdimuħamədow, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak pnjaħan pnatas
